channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports

item.title: Iga Swiatek is given extra security protection at the Miami Open after being verbally harassed
item.description: MIAMI GARDENS, Fla. (AP) — Iga Swiatek was given extra security protection at the Miami Open after being verbally attacked during a practice session by a man who had sent the five-time Grand Slam champion harassing messages via social media. “We monitor the network to catch these types of issues.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: American figure skater Alysa Liu takes the lead on the opening night of the world championships
item.description: BOSTON (AP) — Alysa Liu rarely wavers when it comes to anything, whether it be her abrupt decision to retire after the 2022 Winter Olympics, or the American figure skater's similarly stunning decision to announce her comeback early last year.
item.dc:creator: DAVE SKRETTA, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Newly signed Russell Wilson says he expects to be the Giants' starting QB this upcoming season
item.description: Russell Wilson joined the New York Giants with every intention of being under center when the regular season begins.
item.dc:creator: Dennis Waszak Jr., Associated Press, KPRC 2

item.title: VCU names former Bryant head basketball coach Phil Martelli Jr. the next Rams head coach
item.description: Phil Martelli Jr. has been named the 14th head coach of VCU Men’s Basketball team, which was officially announced by Athletics Director Ed McLaughlin on Wednesday.
item.dc:creator: Nolan Knight, PHL 17

item.title: Vikings want McCarthy as starting QB after tabling Rodgers conversation with never say never
item.description: EAGAN, Minn. (AP) — The Minnesota Vikings have moved forward with a roster revolving around J.J. McCarthy as their starting quarterback and tabled consideration of Aaron Rodgers — even if the door remains open at least a little.
item.dc:creator: DAVE CAMPBELL, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Love affair back on at March Madness. Now with Arizona, Caleb Love takes on Duke again
item.description: NEWARK, N.J. (AP) — He's back. If there's a single player Duke or any of its fans would love to not run into when the stakes are this high, Caleb Love would be that player. Love used to play for Duke's biggest rival, North Carolina. Now he plays for Duke's next opponent, Arizona.
item.dc:creator: EDDIE PELLS, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: This California MLB team has highest median ticket price, new report finds
item.description: A California team has the highest median ticket price, a new report found, but they don't play in Los Angeles.
item.dc:creator: Addy Bink, Fox 5

item.title: A handful of March Madness coaches stand out for their fashion choices amid a sea of casual attire
item.description: Notre Dame's Niele Ivey is doing it the way she learned how to coach, pacing the sideline in stylish attire in a time when most coaches favor far more casual attire. “When I first got into coaching, I learned under a Hall of Fame coach," Ivey said.
item.dc:creator: KRISTIE RIEKEN, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: FIFA details Club World Cup prize money with $125M target for the winner in $1BN fund
item.description: GENEVA (AP) — The winner of FIFA’s first 32-team Club World Cup in the United States could earn $125 million as details of a $1 billion prize money fund were finally published Wednesday.
item.dc:creator: GRAHAM DUNBAR, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Arkansas' Calipari not backing off relying on freshmen in NIL, transfer portal era
item.description: (AP) - John Calipari embraced the one-and-done era like few college basketball coaches, becoming one of the best annually at bringing in talented freshmen and routinely getting them to Final Fours before shipping them off to the NBA.
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: In the era of big velocities, some pitchers are still finding other ways to succeed
item.description: SURPRISE, Ariz. (AP) — Texas Rangers left-hander Cody Bradford says he realized early on that he probably wouldn’t ever possess the type of fastball that causes scouts to take a second look at their radar guns.
item.dc:creator: STEVE MEGARGEE, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Lamont Butler has performed on Final Four stage before. He wants to get back there with a new school
item.description: Lamont Butler doesn’t want to settle for just one shining moment on a Final Four stage. The guy who made the buzzer beater to send San Diego State to the 2023 NCAA Tournament championship game is confident he can get back there as a fifth-year senior with Kentucky.
item.dc:creator: STEVE MEGARGEE, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Betts, Lee and Prince are posting up in women's March Madness. There are fewer players like them
item.description: AP All-America center Lauren Betts, Ayoka Lee and Sedona Prince are traditional post players, and all have been in the middle of their teams making it to the Sweet 16 in the women's NCAA Tournament.
item.dc:creator: STEPHEN HAWKINS, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Oakland Roots sell over 24K tickets to Coliseum home opener
item.description: (KRON) -- The Oakland Roots Soccer Club have sold over 24,000 tickets to their home opener on Saturday. The team, which will make its debut Saturday at the iconic Oakland Coliseum, is already set to smash its previous attendance record.
item.dc:creator: Alex Baker, KRON4

item.title: BYU shuts down VCU in NCAA Tournament, 80-71
item.description: DENVER (ABC4 Sports) - The last time BYU played in the NCAA Tournament in Denver in 2011, they made it to the Sweet 16. The Cougars are now one win away from going back.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Derrick Rose to throw out first pitch at White Sox Opening Day
item.description: CHICAGO (WGN) — The Chicago White Sox announced several highlights planned for their regular season-opening series against the Los Angeles Angels, including Derrick Rose throwing out the ceremonial first pitch on Opening Day.
item.dc:creator: Eli Ong, WGN 9
